quality.rationale: 结合高斯法坐标与初值约束，通过外曲率跳跃条件推导表面层运动方程，逻辑链条清晰且具有明确的引力理论物理背景

origin.question:
Problem 21.9. For a surface layer described with Gaussian normal coordinates $\mathbf{n}$ and $\mathbf{x}^i$ ( $i = 1, 2, 3$ ) (see solution to Problem 21.8) derive the equation of motion of the surface layer
$$
\mathbf {S}_{j \mid i}^{i} + \left[ \mathbf {T}_{j}^{n} \right] = 0
$$
where the square brackets denote a discontinuity across the surface and the slash denotes covariant differentiation with respect to the intrinsic geometry of the 3-surface.
origin.solution:
Solution 21.9. From the initial value equations, we have
$$
G_{i}^{n} = - \left\{K_{i}^{m} |_{m} - (T r K)_{, i} \right\} = - \left\{K_{i}^{m} - \delta_{i}^{m} T r (K) \right\} |_{m} = 8 \pi T_{i}^{n}.
$$
The discontinuity of this equation across the 3-surface is
$$
\left. \left\{\left[ K_{i}^{m} \right] - \delta_{i}^{m} T r [ K ] \right\} \right|_{m} = - 8 \pi \left[ T_{i}^{n} \right].
$$
By combining this with our result from Problem 21.8, we have then
$$
S_{i}^{m} \left|_{m} = - \left[ T_{i}^{n} \right] \right..
$$
